name: Catfolk

changes.text: - Replace the human trait with the catfolk trait.

universal_monster_ability.name: Low-Light Vision
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster can see in dim light as though it were bright light, so it ignores the concealed condition due to dim light.

text: Catfolk are often avid travelers who will keep a collection of trinkets from their various journeys. They can often be extremely social, both within their community and with strangers. They tend to be quick on their feet.
